data.body: S2 close FAILED on 2 criteria: composite-contract needed a RAISING verifier after accept (strengthened test: never=raises), and make-pass meta-criterion (added CI-evidence comment citing 716 Verified+1). Amended S2 (43d60436a) + rebased S3 (c62f211ed), re-pushed 716 ps4 + 717 ps2. Will re-close S2/S3 after CI. Checking S4 review.
